meta.title: Meriq — Broker-ready cases before you file
meta.description: Meriq turns messy shipment emails, invoices, packing lists, and bills of lading into broker-ready cases. Your team reviews exceptions, not scattered follow-ups.

hero.eyebrow: AI agents for customs brokers and forwarders
hero.titleLead: Your shipment documents don’t chase themselves.
hero.rotatingPrefix: Built on the documents you already handle:
hero.pitch: Meriq works your pre-filing queue — shipment emails, invoice and packing-list mismatches, missing documents, product clarifications, and broker handoffs.
hero.outcome: Your team reviews broker-ready cases, not scattered follow-ups.

trustBar.lead: Built for customs brokers, freight forwarders, and trade operations teams handling document-heavy shipments.

flow.title: Turn scattered documents into broker-ready cases
flow.subtitle: Meriq extracts, normalizes, and links your shipment documents and emails — so your team reviews clean cases, not scattered threads.
flow.platformTagline: AI agents for customs brokers and forwarders

layers.title: Unified Shipment Context
layers.desc: Extract, normalize, and link shipment data from documents and emails.

layers.title: Readiness Automation
layers.desc: Detect missing documents, mismatches, vague product descriptions, and next actions.

layers.title: Broker Review
layers.desc: Turn messy threads into clean, broker-ready cases with traceable evidence.

roles.title: One shared workspace for forwarders and brokers
roles.subtitle: Forwarders and customs brokers work the same shipment, but the work is scattered across email. Meriq gives both sides a shared pre-clearance workspace.

forwarder.label: For freight forwarders
forwarder.lead: Know what’s missing before the case reaches the broker.
points: Ask the right product clarification questions

broker.label: For customs brokers
broker.lead: Review structured cases instead of hunting through email threads.

blog.title: Vision & writing
blog.subtitle: How we think about the work that happens before filing.

footer.tagline: The AI-native pre-clearance workspace for customs brokers and forwarders.

pilot.title: Apply for the pilot
pilot.subtitle: A few quick questions to see if Meriq's a fit — under a minute.
pilot.sampleDocs: Can you share sample shipment docs?
pilot.successBody: Thanks! We'll review and reach out to set up a short call.
pilot.errorBody: Something went wrong — please try again.
